name: Fruited Cheese Log
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the dried apricots in 1 cup of water for 2 hours. Drain and chop them.
2. Blend the shredded Monterey Jack cheese.
3. Add remaining ingredients to the blended cheese, mixing thoroughly between additions.
4. Shape the mixture into a log measuring 9 inches or two large balls on a sheet of foil.
5. Wrap securely and chill until firm.
6. Roll in chopped nuts, cover again in foil, and refrigerate for at least 24 hours before serving. It may also be frozen.
7. Garnish with cherries and grapes.
